app.about.desc: A local Markdown notebook application for offline writing, editing, and document management.

app.about.update.checkFailed: Unable to check for updates right now.

app.drop.desktopOnly: Copying into the vault from the sidebar requires the desktop app.

app.drop.overlaySidebar: Release to copy files or folders into this vault folder.

app.editor.empty.noNoteDesc: No note is open yet. Create a new note to start writing, and the editor, outline, backlinks, and status feedback will appear here.
app.editor.empty.noWorkspaceDesc: Open a notes folder first so the file list, search, outline, and knowledge panel can work together.
app.ext.emojiPanelHint.generic: Or use the system emoji panel (macOS Ctrl+Cmd+Space / Windows Win+. / Linux Ctrl+.).

app.ext.emojiPanelHint.win: Or use the system emoji panel: Win+.

prefs.nav.label: Settings categories
prefs.restart.webHint: Restart the app manually to apply changes (browser preview cannot relaunch).
prefs.section.appearance.lead: Use the tabs below to switch between built-in theme, external CSS (editor UI only), and UI snippets.
prefs.section.editor.lead: Use the tabs below to switch between typography and auto-save settings.
prefs.section.export.lead: Use the tabs below to switch between export presets and export-only CSS.
prefs.section.general.lead: Workspace and startup options will appear here.
prefs.section.import.lead: Choose where imported images and attachments are stored and how they are referenced.
prefs.section.language.intro: Choose the display language for menus and the interface. Restart required for some changes.
prefs.section.plugins.lead: Browse and install extensions from the local plugin catalog server.
prefs.section.shortcuts.lead: View and customize global keyboard shortcuts. Click a shortcut field, then press a new key combination. Press Esc to cancel.
prefs.section.templates.lead: Use the tabs below to configure daily notes and new-note templates.
prefs.templates.tabs.label: Template sections
prefs.title: Preferences
settings.assets.absolutePath.description: New imports will be copied into this fixed folder.
settings.assets.absolutePath.label: Absolute Storage Location
settings.assets.description: Manage how imported files are stored and referenced.
settings.assets.folderTemplate.label: Folder Template
settings.assets.storageMode.absolute.des: Store all imports in one folder.
settings.assets.storageMode.description: Choose how imported files are stored.
settings.assets.storageMode.label: Storage Mode
settings.assets.title: Assets
settings.editor.autosaveEnabled.descript: Periodically write unsaved changes to disk.
settings.editor.autosaveEnabled.label: Auto-save
settings.editor.autosaveIntervalSec.desc: 30–600 seconds; applies to workspace notes only.
settings.editor.autosaveScope.descriptio: Defaults to the current tab only. “All unsaved documents” must be enabled manually and is riskier with many tabs open.
settings.editor.autosaveScope.label: Auto-save scope
settings.editor.columnWidth.description: Maximum width of the document column in visual mode and Markdown preview (px). Narrower columns suit smaller screens; wider columns use more space on large displays. Changes apply immediately.
settings.editor.columnWidth.label: Reading column width
settings.editor.fontFamily.description: Applies only to document visual mode and source mode (does not affect sidebar or menus).
settings.editor.fontFamily.label: Document Font Family
settings.editor.fontFamily.placeholder: e.g. Inter, PingFang SC, JetBrains Mono
settings.editor.fontSize.description: Applies to body text, headings, source mode, and code blocks in px (1–60). Leave empty for the default (~17px). Changes apply immediately.
settings.editor.fontSize.label: Document Font Size
settings.editor.formatToolbarEnabled.des: On by default. When off, the formatting toolbar row is hidden and the preference is saved to app settings for the next launch.
settings.editor.groups.autosave.descript: Write unsaved changes to disk on a schedule so you do not lose work.
settings.editor.groups.autosave.title: Auto-save
settings.editor.groups.performance.descr: When a note exceeds 400,000 characters, Lunote automatically enables performance mode: lighter source highlighting, longer save debounce, and reduced outline sync. Focus mode hides panels for writing but does not change editor rendering.
settings.editor.groups.performance.title: Performance mode
settings.editor.groups.typography.descri: Control the font, text size, and reading column width used in the editor area.
settings.editor.groups.typography.title: Writing appearance
settings.editor.spellcheckEnabled.descri: Uses your system spell checker in visual and source modes. Code blocks, math, and diagrams stay excluded.
settings.editor.spellcheckEnabled.label: Spell check
settings.editor.tabLead: These settings apply to the note editor and source view only—not the sidebar or menus.
settings.editor.title: Editor
settings.export.description: Control paper size, content width, table of contents behavior, and pagination strategy for exports.
settings.export.pageBreakMode.avoidBlock: Keep code blocks, tables, images, and callouts together
settings.export.pageBreakMode.descriptio: Choose how aggressively export tries to avoid awkward page breaks.
settings.export.pageBreakMode.flow: Allow content to flow across page breaks
settings.export.pageBreakMode.label: Pagination strategy
settings.export.preset.description: Choose the default paper size, margins, and content width for HTML/PDF/PNG exports.
settings.export.preset.label: Export preset
settings.export.title: Export
settings.export.tocMode.always: Always insert a table of contents
settings.export.tocMode.description: Choose whether exports honor `[toc]`, always inject a TOC, or suppress it.
settings.export.tocMode.label: Table of contents
settings.file.dropHint: Drop a JSON theme here, or import one from disk.

The format above is used for daily note file names.
In templates, use {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}, {{time:HH:mm}} (customize the date segment as needed).
